commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
The sin of Phogor. The sin committed in the worship of Beelphegor. (Challoner)
Many of the prostitutes had returned home, being terrified at the slaughter of their queen, Cozbi. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The sin of Phogor: The sin committed in the worship of Beelphegor.
